sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86509" key="proanai/resis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαν-αίρεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n86509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">previous murder,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀδελφοῦ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:5:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
